summary: Frontend testing for Billing and Maintenance pages completed. Found and fixed 1 critical bug in the Create Maintenance Request form. All requested features working correctly.

fixed_during_testing.issue: SelectItem components had empty string values which is not allowed in Radix UI
fixed_during_testing.error: A <Select.Item /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string
fixed_during_testing.fix: Changed SelectItem value from '' to 'none' and handled conversion in onValueChange handlers

passed_tests: Billing page loads correctly with data-testid='billing-page'
Current Plan section displays correctly (Free tier)
Usage section shows Properties (2/2), Units (3/5), Team Members (1/1)
3 pricing tiers displayed: Free, Standard, Pro
Pro plan shows $82/month (Annual) with 'Save $204/year' and 'Most Popular' badge
Monthly/Annual billing period toggle works correctly
Upgrade buttons visible for Standard and Pro plans
Embedded checkout modal opens when clicking Upgrade button
Stripe checkout form loads with payment methods (Card, Cash App Pay, Affirm, Klarna, Bank)
Checkout displays correct plan amount (US$288.00 for Standard Annual)
Maintenance page loads correctly with data-testid='maintenance-page'
Maintenance stats cards display: Total, Open, In Progress, Completed, Emergency
Create Request button visible with data-testid='create-request-btn'
Create Maintenance Request form opens with correct fields (Property, Unit, Category, Priority, Title, Description, Tenant)
Form has Cancel and Create Request buttons
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: DialogContent missing aria-describedby (accessibility warning) - consider adding DialogDescription component
Info: Stripe console warnings about domain verification for Apple Pay - only affects test mode
context_for_next_testing_agent: Billing page and Maintenance page fully tested. Embedded Stripe checkout working correctly (TEST MODE). Fixed SelectItem empty value bug in Maintenance form. All CRUD and UI features working as expected. Stripe Publishable key is configured and checkout session creates successfully.
rca_of_issues: Radix UI SelectItem component requires a non-empty string value. The code had value='' for 'No specific unit' and 'No tenant' options which caused a runtime error. Fixed by using value='none' and transforming back to empty string in the onValueChange handler.
